description_long: This is a large, rugged hammer with a cylindrical wooden head reinforced by metal bands and adorned with prominent metal spikes around its circumference. The head appears to be constructed from solid, roughly-hewn wood, with visible grain patterns and a central wooden plug on each striking face. The handle is also wooden, straight, and wrapped with coarse rope near the base for improved grip and durability. The hammer shows signs of heavy use, with scuffs, scratches, and some discoloration on both the head and handle. The overall design is primitive and robust, suggesting it is intended for heavy-duty tasks or as a makeshift weapon. The coloration is predominantly brown with metallic gray accents from the spikes and bands.
description: A large, spiked wooden hammer with a cylindrical head reinforced by metal bands and a rope-wrapped handle. The hammer has a rugged, worn appearance with visible wood grain and metallic spikes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cylindrical wooden head, the central wooden plug, and the metal bands with spikes encircling the head. The rope-wrapped handle is partially visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the spiked metal bands and the rough, textured end grain of the wooden head. The handle's rope wrapping and a protruding rope end are also visible.
description_view_2: This view shows the full length of the hammer, with the handle extending downward and the spiked head clearly visible. The rope wrapping on the handle is prominent.
description_view_3: The end-on view displays the circular end grain of the wooden head, surrounded by metal spikes. The handle and rope wrapping are seen from above.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle wrapped with coarse rope for grip enhancement; the handle is cylindrical and shows visible wood grain and wear.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical wooden head with metal bands and prominent metal spikes encircling both ends; both striking faces are flat and reinforced.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffs, scratches, and discoloration on both the head and handle; some wear on the rope wrapping.
